raw_consumer_statement: I contacted XXXX regarding a flight we had on XX/XX/XXXX. Our flight was supposed to be only XXXX hours and XXXX minutes. Our flight ended up being XXXX hours and XXXX minutes. We were sitting on a plane for XXXX hours with no explanation, no understanding as to what was happening. All we could see are boxes of goods being unloaded off the plane. We took this flight and paid extra to make sure we arrive in XXXX on time for a XXXX appointment that day which we paid before hand. When we asked the airline company and filed a complaint they did not respond. I then went and disputed the charges on American Express because the goods were not delivered as advertised. They credited back our account until they investigated. The airline communicated with the company on XX/XX/XXXX that the charges were correct and that it was technicals difficulties on the plane. But, they did not even announce and they would not let us off the plane to try to catch another flight. But, when we asked the flight attendants in the plane they did not know what was happening either. We submitted evidence and documentation to American Express and they said the case was closed. I again disputed and contacted XXXX XXXX and the airline company and they did not respond to my request. I would like a full refund on the tickets because this was an airline error and the proof that I submitted should of have been granted.
